rulings.Case Title: MARTHA JOAN HILL et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, August 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Wheelabrator Technologies, Inc.¿s demurrer to the first amended complaint is sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the first, second, fifth and sixth causes of action and moot as to the third and fourth causes of action. The phrase ¿certain processing and milling equipment used to process asbestos and/or the safety equipment intended to protect consumers from asbestos¿ is an insufficient description of a product or products for purposes of products liability based on exposure to toxic materials. (Bockrath) =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: MARTHA JOAN HILL et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, August 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. DEFENDANT WHEELABRATOR TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is off calendar at the request of the moving party. =(220/HEK)
